ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Continued To Oct-16-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Arbitration Order to Show Cause.
Appearances: Terry Daniels self-represented Plaintiff.
Ms. Sabrina M. Berdux, Esq. for the Defendant Xiong Tong, et al

Ms. Berdux, counsel for the Defense, request more time to schedule Arbitration. Parties present arguments to the Court. The Court orders that the arbitration jurisdiction is extended 90 days to 9-10-2012. The Order to Show Cause re Arbitration shall be continued to 10-16-2012 at 2:00 pm in Department 610. Court to send notice.

Visiting Judge Wallace Douglas (Retired), Clerk Melinka Jones, Not Reported. (610)
